title: rubus × canifolius
intro: Rubus × canifolius is a hybrid of the black raspberry and the red raspberry, resulting in a unique plant with characteristics from both parent species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × canifolius include its ability to support heart health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Rubus × canifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its sweet and tart flavor.
